violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was Correct By: 02/02/2026
Utensils were observed in stagnant water. Utensil was relocated. Proper storage reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The hand-washing sink in the back prep area was observed with a clear Cambro container inside of sink. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Container was removed from sink and washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Bag of cough drops were stored with utensils and other food service equipment. Utensils were washed, rinsed, and sanitized at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024
